recommendations.title: A Christmas Horror Story
recommendations.overview: Christmas is supposed to be a time of joy, peace and goodwill. But for some folks in the small town of Bailey Downs, it turns into something much less festive.
recommendations.director: Brett Sullivan, Grant Harvey, Steven Hoban

recommendations.title: Ginger Snaps
recommendations.overview: The story of two outcast sisters, Ginger and Brigitte, in the mindless suburban town of Bailey Downs. On the night of Ginger's first period, she is savagely attacked by a wild creature. Ginger's wounds miraculously heal but something is not quite rig

recommendations.title: Don't Kill Me
recommendations.overview: After Mirta dies of a drug overdose with her lover, she resuscitates alone and discovers she's part of a violent world she never knew existed.

recommendations.title: Ginger Snaps Back: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: Set in 19th Century Canada, Brigitte and her sister Ginger take refuge in a Traders' Fort which later becomes under siege by some savage werewolves. But when one of the girls is bitten, they have no one to turn to but themselves.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A man, crippled in an accident, returns to the woods after rehabilitation, certain that he'll not see Bigfoot again.

recommendations.title: Spirited Away
recommendations.overview: A young girl, Chihiro, becomes trapped in a strange new world of spirits. When her parents undergo a mysterious transformation, she must call upon the courage she never knew she had to free her family.

recommendations.title: The Scary House
recommendations.overview: When a big-city family moves to a remote town, two young brothers and their new friends try to solve the menacing mystery that haunts their home.

recommendations.title: Tideland
recommendations.overview: Because of the actions of her irresponsible parents, a young girl is left alone on a decrepit country estate and survives inside her fantastic imagination.

recommendations.title: Dark Cloud
recommendations.overview: Following the aftermath of a horrific accident, a woman is voluntarily subjected to artificial intelligence for rehabilitation.

recommendations.title: Death Wish 4: The Crackdown
recommendations.overview: After the death of his girlfriend's daughter from a drug overdose, Paul Kersey takes on the local drug cartel.
